Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Matthew J. Perotti, Esq. for Shirley Gray, David Wong, Nancy Young, and Sammy J. Wong, Petitioners;
Shirley Gray, Petitioner;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 8/9/2005 is admitted to probate. David Wong is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for November 4, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: R. Cabrera. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Continued To Oct-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
